scripts.format: prettier --check package.json tsconfig.json next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs components.json tailwind.config.ts eslint.config.mjs vitest.config.ts orval.config.ts src tests docs/api/openapi.yaml
scripts.lint: eslint src tests next.config.ts tailwind.config.ts vitest.config.ts orval.config.ts --max-warnings=0
scripts.api:check: pnpm api:spec && pnpm api:client && pnpm api:docs
scripts.db:migrate: tsx -e "import { getStorageClient } from './src/server/storage/client.ts'; const client = getStorageClient(); client.migrate(); client.close();"
scripts.db:check: drizzle-kit check --config drizzle.config.ts && pnpm db:drift && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test tests/unit/storage/schema.test.ts
scripts.db:drift: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && cp -R src/server/storage/migrations/meta "$tmpdir/meta" && drizzle-kit generate --config drizzle.config.ts --out "$tmpdir" --name drift_check --prefix none >/tmp/subhub-drizzle-drift.log && if [ -f "$tmpdir/drift_check.sql" ]; then cat /tmp/subhub-drizzle-drift.log; echo 'Drizzle schema 与已提交 migration 存在漂移，请运行 pnpm db:generate 并提交 migration。'; rm -rf "$tmpdir"; exit 1; fi; rm -rf "$tmpdir"
